Reference
Tachibana, K. (1986). Excitation of 1s5,1s4, and 1s2 levels of argon by low-energy electrons. Physical Review A, 34(2), 1007.

Variables (Var,Unit,Rms,Max)
*********************************
E/N         Vcm2        n/a     n/a
a1/N        cm2         n/a     25%
a2/N        cm2         n/a     30%
a3/N        cm2         n/a     25%
a4/N        cm2         n/a     30%
*********************************

Excitation energy (eV)
#################################
1   11.55
2   11.62
3   11.72
4   11.83
#################################
